name: moviola-directing
description: Direct MOVIOLA Drafts with its canonical Directing Rules and MCP workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Direct MOVIOLA Drafts with one canonical rulebook.
interface.longDescription: Author, edit, review, and render MOVIOLA Scenes and Cuts through its MCP tools while following the same Directing Rules used by the server.
defaultPrompt: Review my MOVIOLA Draft and suggest the next directing decision.
Build the next Scene with complete Cuts and explain the choices.
